summary: Iteration 69: Projects pages redesign FULLY VERIFIED. Both /projects listing and /projects/[slug] detail pages working correctly with Dark Luxury theme (OLED black #050505, gold #C9A962 accents).

projects_listing_page.hero_section: PASS - Hero with background image, 'PORTFOLIO' badge, 'OUR PROJECTS' title visible
projects_listing_page.filter_buttons: PASS - All 4 filters work (All: 20, Residential: 11, Commercial: 4, Villa: 4)
projects_listing_page.project_count: PASS - Count updates dynamically when filter changes
projects_listing_page.project_cards: PASS - 20 cards with image, title, location (pin icon), year badge, type badge, system tags
projects_listing_page.hover_effect: PASS - Title turns gold rgb(201,169,98) / #C9A962 on hover
projects_listing_page.rounded_filters: PASS - Filter buttons have rounded-full pill style
projects_listing_page.cta_section: PASS - 'Book Free Consultation' CTA links to /consultation

project_detail_page.hero_image: PASS - Full-width hero with gradient overlay
project_detail_page.project_info: PASS - Type badge, year, title displayed
project_detail_page.about_section: PASS - 'ABOUT THE PROJECT' with gold header
project_detail_page.sidebar: PASS - 'PROJECT INFO' with Category, Location, Completed fields
project_detail_page.brands_section: PASS - 'PREMIUM BRANDS' displays Control4, Lutron, Sonos
project_detail_page.gallery: PASS - 'View all images' link present for projects with multiple images

dark_mode.no_white_backgrounds: PASS - No white backgrounds detected in dark mode
dark_mode.gold_accents: PASS - 16-18 gold accent elements (#C9A962) per page

navigation.card_to_detail: PASS - Clicking project card navigates to detail page

api_verification.GET /api/projects/{id}: 200 OK - Works for projects without slug

critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean - proper data-testid attributes on all key elements
Filter logic correctly uses client-side filtering with useState
Projects with null slug correctly fall back to ID for URL routing
Gold hover effect properly applied with group-hover:text-[#C9A962]
Dark mode uses OLED black (#050505) throughout
Glass-morphism effect on sidebar using bg-white/[0.03] works correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Projects pages fully functional. 20 projects total (11 Residential, 4 Commercial, 4 Villa, 1 other). Filter buttons update count dynamically. Projects may have slug=null, in which case ID is used in URL. Detail pages show hero, about, systems, gallery, sidebar with project info, premium brands, and CTA. Dark Luxury theme with OLED black background (#050505) and gold accents (#C9A962) verified.
